query:
SELECT l.id, l.companyName, l.websiteUrl, a.summary, a.prestigeScore 
FROM leads l 
LEFT JOIN audits a ON l.id = a.leadId 
WHERE l.status = 'audited' 
AND l.id NOT IN (SELECT leadId FROM email_queue)
AND l.id != 360018
LIMIT 5;
